# ListStart

## Tags
queue, top, start, next, playlist

## Categories
multimedia, text

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/list-start)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ListStart;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ListStart { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
